nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Maintainer and self-hoster guide for the APNs push relay Cloudflare Worker, covering KV/APNs key setup, self-registration, per-server API key auth, endpoints, deployment, and troubleshooting.
nodes.languageNotes: Documents the maintainer-hosted relay pattern: self-hosted Go servers forward Bearer-authenticated push requests to the Worker, which holds the single APNs provider key.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: npm manifest for the APNs push-relay Cloudflare Worker, declaring wrangler dev/deploy/typecheck scripts and TypeScript/wrangler dev dependencies.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the APNs push-relay Worker, scoping compilation to the src directory with Cloudflare Workers types.
